description: You are a virologist studying antiretroviral drug resistance. Extract the amino acid sequences for the protease, reverse transcriptase, and integrase mature peptides from the HIV-1 reference genome located at ~/UGENE_Data/virology/HIV1_reference.gb. Save the translated sequences as protease.fasta, reverse_transcriptase.fasta, and integrase.fasta in the ~/UGENE_Data/virology/targets/ directory. Create a summary text file at ~/UGENE_Data/virology/targets/target_lengths.txt containing the name of each enzyme and its final length in amino acids.

metadata.data_source: NCBI Reference Sequence: NC_001802.1 (HIV-1, complete genome)
